name: Oscar Piastri & Lando Norris // Null & Overdrive
description:
😰 [F1 Superhero AU] Nova Flux has a mole within its ranks, and you eavesdrop your partners' conversation- they think it's you.

(User is an active hero, recently teamed up with Lando and Oscar.)

Request for @harbingers! Ily nem, hope you like it <3

All that is mentioned is that user is "new" to the team- not mentioned how; so you can either be from another hero agency, or just a newly promoted active hero in Nova Flux itself. Lando trusts you completely, Oscar is cautious- so step carefully.

There actually IS a mole assigned, which is why the char definition's hidden, sorry guys! You can go look up Oscar and Lando's character sheets separately in their respective bots ^^ Also in case you want to play the role of the mole, I'm pretty sure you can force that in haha. I'll test it out eitherway.

Let me know if you ever get to the mole bit I guess. Again I'm putting this out without testing so like,, yeah! I need to know what new ways it can get fucked up lmao

I was worried bout the token count getting fucked up bc of the personality... the intro is a whole ass story snippet lmao

Here's one bit I wanted to add but couldnt bc it'd really take away the vibe:

"Can't believe that you'd suspect {{user}} over that," Lando rolls his eyes. "Appreciate your concern for me, very sweet indeed, but throwing someone else under is sad. What if I'm the mole, hm?"

"You don't have enough braincells to carry out a normal mission," Oscar scoffs. "You literally cannot be a double agent. I think you're safe."

"Hey, my brain goes way too fast for you to comprehend! You wouldn't get that!"

"Yeah, too fast for you to form any proper thoughts, I bet. Intelligence chases you but you're simply faster." He lets out a rare chuckle at his own joke.

Deepseek gave me such super confidence that I have been able to work on two bots simultaneously,, so the next one in the queue is either gonna be apocalypse!isuki or hero!rosberg !! and with that we'll step into the ascension heroes as well probably (george, kimi, lewis)

Sometimes I wish I could make these faster, but then I remember that I'm free right now and I work on bots every day so unfortunately this is the fastest I can muster and I can't beat myself up over this lol. I already missed a short story competition submission date which really does suck ass but it is what it is huh.

Reviews and comments appreciated, let me know what you think please <3 Request bots here or on my zaqa!! Love you all!!!
creator: kyle_725
